# The Retreat Register

> A national directory of verified corporate retreat venues in the United States,
> launching in 2026. Free to browse. Venues do not pay for placement or ranking.

## What it is

The Retreat Register catalogs resorts, lodges, ranches, estates, boutique hotels with
dedicated meeting space, casino lodges, and purpose-built conference retreat campuses
across the United States. It is a reference work, not a broker: listings are compiled
from public sources, machine-checked, and human-reviewed before publication.

## Key pages

- [Updates](https://theretreatregister.com/updates/): verification progress published
  with real numbers — coverage snapshots, data findings, and what gets cut and why
- [Build log](https://theretreatregister.com/updates/build-log/): one dated entry per
  day since 2026-07-07 — venues verified, junk cut, quality passes; updated daily
- [Markets & coverage](https://theretreatregister.com/markets/): state-by-state counts
  of verified venues, updated as verification continues
- [Methodology](https://theretreatregister.com/methodology/): how venues are verified,
  the quality bar, and what gets a venue cut
- [What's coming](https://theretreatregister.com/whats-coming/): the planner and
  venue-owner experience at launch
- [About](https://theretreatregister.com/about/): what the register is and the rules
  it runs on
- [Contact](https://theretreatregister.com/contact/): corrections and inquiries
- [RSS feed](https://theretreatregister.com/rss.xml)

## Current status (2026-07-12)

- 1,374 venues verified and live in the register; launch planned for 2026
- 2,000+ venue photo sets machine-verified against the properties they claim to show
- 91% of verified venues (1,247 of 1,374) list a direct phone number
- Only 133 of 1,374 venues publish a public starting price — pricing is quote-only
  across most of this industry, and listings say so plainly rather than estimating
- 369 candidates rejected by classification to date; 88 borderline properties held
  for human review; 606 previously rejected venues restored after a systematic
  re-audit of 2,811 rejections (2,193 rejections upheld)
- Every listing is read and reviewed by a person before launch

## Who it serves

- Companies planning offsites, leadership summits, and all-hands retreats (10 to 500 people)
- Teams needing meeting rooms plus on-site lodging
- Churches and congregations planning group getaways (faith-based retreat centers are
  included when they meet the same quality bar: real lodging, professional operation,
  welcoming to outside groups)
- Wellness and group-program organizers (destination spas, health retreats)

## What is deliberately excluded

Municipal convention centers, expo halls, banquet-only facilities, and budget or
economy hotel chains.

## Pricing honesty

Most retreat venues quote per group (head count, season, full-property buyout all move
the price). Where public pricing exists, listings show it; where it is quote-only, the
listing says so explicitly rather than estimating.

## Citation notes

- Venue counts and completeness metrics should cite the data date shown above.
- The site does not publish fake reviews, invented availability, or estimated prices.

## Site

- Homepage: https://theretreatregister.com/
- Launches: 2026 (this file and the homepage update at launch)
